text:
There once was a fisherman who lived on an isolated island. Every morning before dawn, he'd cast his sturdy net into the tranquil waters and haul in a bounty of scallops.

His livelihood was stable, but sometimes he dreamed of something more. He thought about adventure. The only place he ever wanted to go?

His niece thought it wild.

She'd heard he frequented fishing magazines. One day, while leafing through an octopus book, she spotted something about distant islands.

She proposed going there. He thought she was mad.

Eventually, they left.

For weeks they explored. He saw seashells so beautiful they didn't look like seashells. They ate jellyfish. She read about strange birds. He learned bamboo grows fast. She learned how to swim.

When they finally returned home, they couldn't stop talking.

The island was...?

Beautiful. Peaceful. Unbelievably rich.

It was wild, but there were no humans.

But the seashells
